creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
Completely misread your error log: Undefined symbol "EVP_CIPHER_get_key_length"
It means you have an "old" version of openssl, signal-desktop requires openssl3  from security/openssl-devel

The message about org.freedesktop.portal.FileChooser is also present on my desktop after installing xdg-desktop-portal and is harmless
